            <div class="clearfix text-formatted field field--name-body field--type-text-with-summary field--label-hidden field__item"><p><span><span><strong>Effective March 24, 2023: </strong>If you wish to receive further information about the most recent WARN Notice submitted to the Office of Workforce Development (OWD), sign up for our <a href="https://public.govdelivery.com/accounts/MODHEWD/subscriber/new?topic_id=MODHEWD_219" class="ext" data-extlink="" target="_blank" rel="noopener" title="(opens in a new window)">WARN Notice Mailing List<svg focusable="false" width="1em" height="1em" class="ext" data-extlink-placement="append" aria-label="(link is external)" viewBox="0 0 80 40" role="img" aria-hidden="false"><title>(link is external)</title><path d="M48 26c-1.1 0-2 0.9-2 2v26H10V18h26c1.1 0 2-0.9 2-2s-0.9-2-2-2H8c-1.1 0-2 0.9-2 2v40c0 1.1 0.9 2 2 2h40c1.1 0 2-0.9 2-2V28C50 26.9 49.1 26 48 26z"></path><path d="M56 6H44c-1.1 0-2 0.9-2 2s0.9 2 2 2h7.2L30.6 30.6c-0.8 0.8-0.8 2 0 2.8C31 33.8 31.5 34 32 34s1-0.2 1.4-0.6L54 12.8V20c0 1.1 0.9 2 2 2s2-0.9 2-2V8C58 6.9 57.1 6 56 6z"></path></svg></a>. </span></span> WARN Notice updates will be emailed during business operating hours.</p>
<br><br>
<p>To receive any previous WARN Notices, submit an open records request to  <a href="mailto:%20recordscustodian@dhewd.mo.gov" class="file file-inline text-html file--text-html file--text mailto" data-extlink="">recordscustodian@dhewd.mo.gov<svg focusable="false" width="1em" height="1em" class="mailto" data-extlink-placement="append" aria-label="(link sends email)" viewBox="0 10 70 20" role="img" aria-hidden="false"><title>(link sends email)</title><path d="M56 14H8c-1.1 0-2 0.9-2 2v32c0 1.1 0.9 2 2 2h48c1.1 0 2-0.9 2-2V16C58 14.9 57.1 14 56 14zM50.5 18L32 33.4 13.5 18H50.5zM10 46V20.3l20.7 17.3C31.1 37.8 31.5 38 32 38s0.9-0.2 1.3-0.5L54 20.3V46H10z"></path></svg></a>.</p>
<br><br>
<p>For all other inquiries, please contact Heather Dolce, Assistant Commissioner for Communications and Outreach at <a href="mailto:%20heather.dolce@dhewd.mo.gov" class="file file-inline text-html file--text-html file--text mailto" data-extlink="">heather.dolce@dhewd.mo.gov<svg focusable="false" width="1em" height="1em" class="mailto" data-extlink-placement="append" aria-label="(link sends email)" viewBox="0 10 70 20" role="img" aria-hidden="false"><title>(link sends email)</title><path d="M56 14H8c-1.1 0-2 0.9-2 2v32c0 1.1 0.9 2 2 2h48c1.1 0 2-0.9 2-2V16C58 14.9 57.1 14 56 14zM50.5 18L32 33.4 13.5 18H50.5zM10 46V20.3l20.7 17.3C31.1 37.8 31.5 38 32 38s0.9-0.2 1.3-0.5L54 20.3V46H10z"></path></svg></a>.</p></div>
